requirement_topic.en: CE Conformity Assessment — LVD, EMC, RED (if wireless) — Norway (EEA)
requirement_topic.zh: CE合格评定 — 低压指令、电磁兼容指令及无线设备指令（如适用）——挪威（EEA）
requirement_topic.zht: CE合格評定 — 低壓指令、電磁相容指令及無線設備指令（如適用）——挪威（EEA）

summary.en: EV chargers sold in Norway must bear the CE marking, demonstrating conformity with all applicable EU legislation as incorporated into Norway via the EEA Agreement. Norway is an EEA member (not EU member) but CE marking is mandatory — LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, and RED 2014/53/EU all apply via the EEA Agreement. Wired AC/DC chargers typically fall under LVD and EMCD; chargers with wireless communication (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth for smart charging) additionally require conformity with RED. Conformity is generally established by manufacturer self-declaration supported by a technical file. Harmonised EN standards are voluntary routes to presumption of conformity, not mandatory legal requirements in themselves.
summary.zh: 在挪威销售的电动汽车充电器须加贴CE标志，证明符合通过EEA协议并入挪威的所有适用欧盟法律。挪威为EEA成员（非欧盟成员国），但CE标志为强制要求——低压指令2014/35/EU、电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU和无线设备指令2014/53/EU均通过EEA协议适用。有线交流/直流充电器通常须符合低压指令及电磁兼容指令；带无线通信功能（如Wi-Fi、蓝牙）的充电器还须符合无线设备指令。合格性通常由制造商自我声明并以技术文件支持。协调EN标准是自愿的推定符合性路径，其本身并非强制性法律要求。
summary.zht: 在挪威銷售的電動汽車充電器須加貼CE標誌，證明符合通過EEA協議並入挪威的所有適用歐盟法律。挪威為EEA成員（非歐盟成員國），但CE標誌為強制要求——低壓指令2014/35/EU、電磁相容指令2014/30/EU和無線設備指令2014/53/EU均通過EEA協議適用。有線交流/直流充電器通常須符合低壓指令及電磁相容指令；帶無線通訊功能（如Wi-Fi、藍牙）的充電器還須符合無線設備指令。合格性通常由製造商自我聲明並以技術文件支持。協調EN標準是自願的推定符合性路徑，其本身並非強制性法律要求。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement)
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMCD — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement)
Directive 2014/53/EU (RED — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement)
EN 61851-1 (AC EV charging)
EN IEC 61851-21-2 (EMC for off-board EV chargers)
EN 55032 / EN 55035 (EMC emissions/immunity)

summary.en: In China, EV chargers require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) under the GB/T and GB standards regime. Key standards include GB/T 18487.1 (AC charging system) and GB/T 20234 series (connectors). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification through designated bodies (CABs); it does not involve self-declaration and is structurally different from CE's conformity-based model.
summary.zh: 在中国，电动汽车充电器须通过中国强制认证（CCC），依据GB/T和GB标准。主要标准包括GB/T 18487.1（交流充电系统）及GB/T 20234系列（接口标准）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由指定认证机构审核，与CE自我声明模式存在结构性差异。
summary.zht: 在中國，電動汽車充電器須通過中國強制認證（CCC），依據GB/T和GB標準。主要標準包括GB/T 18487.1（交流充電系統）及GB/T 20234系列（接口標準）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由指定認證機構審核，與CE自我聲明模式存在結構性差異。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 (AC EV charging system)
GB/T 20234.1-2023 (general requirements for connectors)
GB/T 20234.2-2015 (AC charging interface)
GB/T 20234.3-2023 (DC charging interface)
CCC certification (CNCA mandatory)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must obtain CE marking via EEA-recognised conformity assessment routes (self-declaration under harmonised EN standards or notified-body involvement for certain RED equipment). CCC certification is not recognised in Norway/EEA and does not substitute for CE. Manufacturers must generate EU-specific technical documentation, test reports referencing EN standards, and an EU Declaration of Conformity — none of which are produced as part of the CCC process.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须通过EEA认可的合格评定途径（依据协调EN标准自我声明，或对部分无线设备指令产品聘用公告机构）取得CE标志。CCC认证在挪威/EEA不被认可，无法替代CE。制造商须单独编制欧盟技术文件、引用EN标准的测试报告及欧盟合格声明，而这些均不属于CCC流程的产出物。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須透過EEA認可的合格評定途徑（依據協調EN標準自我聲明，或對部分無線設備指令產品聘用公告機構）取得CE標誌。CCC認證在挪威/EEA不被認可，無法取代CE。製造商須單獨編製歐盟技術文件、引用EN標準的測試報告及歐盟合格聲明，而這些均不屬於CCC流程的產出物。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: CE marking and conformity with all applicable EEA directives/regulations before Norway/EEA market access (all applicable via EEA Agreement). Harmonised EN standards are voluntary presumption-of-conformity tools; alternatives are allowed if compliance is demonstrated.

source.publisher: Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate (NVE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking is mandatory before placing EV chargers on the Norway/EEA market (CE marking mandatory via EEA Agreement — Norway is EEA, not EU, but CE requirement is the same). CCC does not substitute for CE. Manufacturers must independently build EU technical files and, for wireless-enabled chargers, ensure RED compliance where applicable. Harmonised EN standards may support presumption of conformity but are not the mandatory legal obligation themselves.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在挪威/EEA市场销售电动汽车充电器前，CE标志为强制要求（CE标志通过EEA协议强制适用——挪威为EEA成员而非欧盟成员国，但CE要求相同）。CCC不能替代CE。制造商须独立建立欧盟技术文件，并在充电器具备无线功能时确保符合无线设备指令（如适用）。协调EN标准可支持推定符合性，但并非强制性法律义务本身。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在挪威/EEA市場銷售電動汽車充電器前，CE標誌為強制要求（CE標誌通過EEA協議強制適用——挪威為EEA成員而非歐盟成員國，但CE要求相同）。CCC不能取代CE。製造商須獨立建立歐盟技術文件，並在充電器具備無線功能時確保符合無線設備指令（如適用）。協調EN標準可支持推定符合性，但並非強制性法律義務本身。

requirement_topic.en: EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) and Technical File — Norway
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟合格声明（DoC）及技术文件——挪威
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟合格聲明（DoC）及技術文件——挪威

summary.en: Before placing a product on the Norway/EEA market, the manufacturer (or its EU/EEA authorised representative) must draw up an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) listing all applicable directives and the harmonised standards applied, and must compile and retain a technical file for at least 10 years. The DoC must be made available to market surveillance authorities on request. Requirements are set out in each applicable directive (LVD Art. 15, EMCD Art. 14, RED Art. 19) and in Decision 768/2008/EC (modular conformity assessment) — all incorporated via the EEA Agreement.
summary.zh: 将产品投放挪威/EEA市场前，制造商（或其欧盟/EEA授权代表）须签署欧盟合格声明（DoC），列明所有适用指令及所采用的协调标准，并须编制技术文件并保存至少10年。DoC须在市场监管机构要求时提供。相关要求载于各适用指令（低压指令第15条、电磁兼容指令第14条、无线设备指令第19条）及第768/2008/EC号决定（模块化合格评定）——均通过EEA协议并入。
summary.zht: 將產品投放挪威/EEA市場前，製造商（或其歐盟/EEA授權代表）須簽署歐盟合格聲明（DoC），列明所有適用指令及所採用的協調標準，並須編製技術文件並保存至少10年。DoC須在市場監管機構要求時提供。相關要求載於各適用指令（低壓指令第15條、電磁相容指令第14條、無線設備指令第19條）及第768/2008/EC號決定（模組化合格評定）——均通過EEA協議並入。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU Art. 15 (LVD DoC — applicable via EEA Agreement)
Directive 2014/30/EU Art. 14 (EMCD DoC — applicable via EEA Agreement)
Directive 2014/53/EU Art. 19 (RED DoC — applicable via EEA Agreement)
Decision 768/2008/EC (modular conformity assessment framework)

summary.en: Under the Chinese CCC regime, the equivalent documentary output is the CCC certificate issued by the designated certification body, accompanied by type-test reports. There is no manufacturer self-declaration equivalent to the EU DoC; the certificate is issued by a third party. Post-certificate, manufacturers must maintain a production consistency system audited periodically by the CAB.
summary.zh: 在中国CCC制度下，与欧盟DoC对应的文件是由指定认证机构颁发的CCC证书及型式试验报告。中国没有相当于欧盟合格声明的制造商自我声明；证书由第三方颁发，且证书持有人须建立生产一致性体系，由认证机构定期审核。
summary.zht: 在中國CCC制度下，與歐盟DoC對應的文件是由指定認證機構頒發的CCC證書及型式試驗報告。中國沒有相當於歐盟合格聲明的製造商自我聲明；證書由第三方頒發，且證書持有人須建立生產一致性體系，由認證機構定期審核。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C25-01:2024 (CCC implementation rules for EV charging equipment — effective 1 March 2025, supersedes any prior voluntary-only scheme; issued CNCA Announcement No. 25/2024)
Measures for the Administration of Compulsory Product Certification (SAMR 2020)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting to Norway/EEA must create an EU-format DoC from scratch — listing each applicable EU directive (as incorporated via EEA), the specific harmonised standards applied, the manufacturer's name and address (or EU/EEA authorised representative's), and a traceable signatory. The CCC certificate neither replaces nor simplifies this; test data generated for CCC may be re-used only if it was produced against equivalent EN test methods, which requires engineering review.
gap.zh: 出口挪威/EEA的中国制造商须从头编制欧盟格式的合格声明——列明每项适用的欧盟指令（通过EEA并入）、所采用的协调标准、制造商名称及地址（或欧盟/EEA授权代表信息）以及可追溯的签署人。CCC证书不能替代或简化此要求；CCC的测试数据仅在依据等效EN测试方法产生的前提下方可复用，这需要工程层面的评审。
gap.zht: 出口挪威/EEA的中國製造商須從頭編製歐盟格式的合格聲明——列明每項適用的歐盟指令（通過EEA並入）、所採用的協調標準、製造商名稱及地址（或歐盟/EEA授權代表資訊）以及可追溯的簽署人。CCC證書不能取代或簡化此要求；CCC的測試數據僅在依據等效EN測試方法產生的前提下方可複用，這需要工程層面的審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — must accompany product or be available on request
mandatory_status.cn: N/A — replaced by third-party CCC certificate regime

source.publisher: Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate (NVE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An EU DoC is a legal document that manufacturers or their EU/EEA representatives must sign and retain. It cannot be delegated to a test lab or certification body. Chinese exporters with only CCC documentation must draft the DoC in-house or engage an EEA-based compliance consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 欧盟合格声明是制造商或其欧盟/EEA代表须签署并留存的法律文件，不能委托检测机构或认证机构代为履行。仅持有CCC文件的中国出口商须自行起草合格声明或聘请EEA合规顾问协助。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 歐盟合格聲明是製造商或其歐盟/EEA代表須簽署並留存的法律文件，不能委託檢測機構或認證機構代為履行。僅持有CCC文件的中國出口商須自行起草合格聲明或聘請EEA合規顧問協助。

requirement_topic.en: EU Economic Operator / Authorised Representative — Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 (Norway/EEA)
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟经济运营商/授权代表 — 法规（EU）2019/1020（挪威/EEA）
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟經濟運營商/授權代表 — 法規（EU）2019/1020（挪威/EEA）

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 on market surveillance and product compliance requires that products placed on the EEA market have an identifiable 'responsible economic operator' established in the EEA. This regulation applies in Norway via the EEA Agreement. For products manufactured outside the EEA, this means the importer or, if no EEA importer, a mandated EEA authorised representative (Art. 4). The responsible operator must: hold the DoC and technical file or ensure they are accessible; register in RAPEX/ICSMS where required; cooperate with market surveillance authorities; and take corrective action if a product is non-compliant. This obligation applies to EV chargers as CE-marked electrical equipment sold in Norway.
summary.zh: 法规（EU）2019/1020关于市场监督与产品合规的规定通过EEA协议适用于挪威，要求投放EEA市场的产品须有一个在EEA境内设立的、可识别的"责任经济运营商"。对于EEA境外制造的产品，这意味着需要由进口商担任，或在没有EEA进口商的情况下，委托一名EEA授权代表（第4条）。责任运营商须：持有或确保可访问合格声明及技术文件；在必要时在RAPEX/ICSMS登记注册；配合市场监管机构；并在产品不合规时采取纠正措施。上述义务适用于作为CE标志电气设备在挪威销售的电动汽车充电器。
summary.zht: 法規（EU）2019/1020關於市場監督與產品合規的規定通過EEA協議適用於挪威，要求投放EEA市場的產品須有一個在EEA境內設立的、可識別的「責任經濟運營商」。對於EEA境外製造的產品，這意味著需要由進口商擔任，或在沒有EEA進口商的情況下，委託一名EEA授權代表（第4條）。責任運營商須：持有或確保可訪問合格聲明及技術文件；在必要時在RAPEX/ICSMS登記注冊；配合市場監管機構；並在產品不合規時採取糾正措施。上述義務適用於作為CE標誌電氣設備在挪威銷售的電動汽車充電器。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020, Art. 4 (responsible economic operator — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement)
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020, Art. 5 (obligations of importers)
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020, Art. 8 (market surveillance obligations)

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring a domestic responsible operator for export-bound products. Chinese manufacturers exporting abroad appoint foreign distributors or agents commercially, but there is no statutory requirement to designate an EEA-resident legal representative responsible for CE compliance and market surveillance cooperation.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同要求出口产品指定境内责任运营商。中国出口商通常以商业方式委任海外经销商或代理，但并无法定要求须指定一名在EEA境内居住、负责CE合规及配合市场监管的法定代表人。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同要求出口產品指定境內責任運營商。中國出口商通常以商業方式委任海外經銷商或代理，但並無法定要求須指定一名在EEA境內居住、負責CE合規及配合市場監管的法定代表人。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese equivalent

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese EV charger manufacturer shipping directly to Norwegian customers (e.g., via e-commerce) must appoint an EEA-established authorised representative before the first unit enters the Norway/EEA market. Without one, the product cannot legally be placed on the Norway/EEA market under Regulation 2019/1020 (applicable via EEA Agreement). The AR must be named on the product label or documentation.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有对应规定的结构性差距。中国电动汽车充电器制造商若直接向挪威客户发货（如通过电商平台），须在首批产品进入挪威/EEA市场前委任一名在EEA境内设立的授权代表。若无授权代表，产品在法规（EU）2019/1020项下（通过EEA协议适用）不得合法投放挪威/EEA市场。授权代表须在产品标签或文件中注明。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有對應規定的結構性差距。中國電動汽車充電器製造商若直接向挪威客戶發貨（如透過電商平台），須在首批產品進入挪威/EEA市場前委任一名在EEA境內設立的授權代表。若無授權代表，產品在法規（EU）2019/1020項下（通過EEA協議適用）不得合法投放挪威/EEA市場。授權代表須在產品標籤或文件中注明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for non-EEA manufacturers without an EEA importer — Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 applies in Norway via EEA Agreement

source.publisher: Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate (NVE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese manufacturers without an EEA importer must appoint an EEA-established authorised representative. This is a hard legal gate under Regulation 2019/1020 (applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement) — no EEA AR means the product cannot lawfully enter the Norway/EEA market, regardless of CE marking status.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 没有EEA进口商的中国制造商须委任在EEA境内设立的授权代表。根据法规（EU）2019/1020（通过EEA协议适用于挪威），这是一项强制性法律门槛——无论CE标志状态如何，若无EEA授权代表，产品均不得合法进入挪威/EEA市场。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 沒有EEA進口商的中國製造商須委任在EEA境內設立的授權代表。根據法規（EU）2019/1020（通過EEA協議適用於挪威），這是一項強制性法律門檻——無論CE標誌狀態如何，若無EEA授權代表，產品均不得合法進入挪威/EEA市場。

requirement_topic.en: AFIR — Public EV Charging in Norway: Ad-hoc Payment, Interoperability and Technical Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: AFIR — 挪威公共电动汽车充电：即时支付、互操作性及技术规范
requirement_topic.zht: AFIR — 挪威公共電動汽車充電：即時支付、互操作性及技術規範

summary.en: Norway implements Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR) via the EEA Agreement. AFIR mandates functional requirements for publicly accessible EV recharging points, including: (1) ad-hoc charging without a subscription or contract, with the payment instruments required by AFIR for relevant publicly accessible recharging points; (2) transparent price information before a charging session starts; (3) digital connectivity, smart recharging capability, static data and dynamic data obligations for publicly accessible infrastructure; (4) AFIR Annex II technical specifications for publicly accessible recharging points, including Type 2 for normal-power AC recharging points and Combo 2 for high-power DC recharging points; and (5) TEN-T deployment targets. As the country with the world's highest per-capita EV adoption rate, active enforcement of AFIR public charging requirements in Norway is expected from Statens vegvesen (Norwegian Public Roads Administration) and DSOs, making compliance non-negotiable for any public charging deployment in Norway.
summary.zh: 挪威通过EEA协议实施法规（EU）2023/1804（AFIR）。AFIR规定公众可访问电动汽车充电点的功能要求，包括：（1）无需订阅或合同的即时充电，并按AFIR要求为相关公众可访问充电点提供支付工具；（2）充电开始前提供透明价格信息；（3）公众可访问基础设施须满足数字连接、智能充电能力、静态数据和动态数据义务；（4）符合AFIR附件II关于公众可访问充电点的技术规格，包括普通功率交流充电点采用Type 2，高功率直流充电点采用Combo 2；（5）TEN-T部署目标。作为全球人均电动汽车普及率最高的国家，挪威AFIR公共充电要求由Statens vegvesen（挪威公共道路管理局）和配电运营商积极执法，使得合规对于挪威任何公共充电部署均不可商议。
summary.zht: 挪威通過EEA協議實施法規（EU）2023/1804（AFIR）。AFIR規定公眾可訪問電動汽車充電點的功能要求，包括：（1）無需訂閱或合同的即時充電，並按AFIR要求為相關公眾可訪問充電點提供支付工具；（2）充電開始前提供透明價格資訊；（3）公眾可訪問基礎設施須滿足數碼連接、智能充電能力、靜態數據和動態數據義務；（4）符合AFIR附件II關於公眾可訪問充電點的技術規格，包括普通功率交流充電點採用Type 2，高功率直流充電點採用Combo 2；（5）TEN-T部署目標。作為全球人均電動汽車普及率最高的國家，挪威AFIR公共充電要求由Statens vegvesen（挪威公共道路管理局）和配電運營商積極執法，使得合規對於挪威任何公共充電部署均不可商議。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR) — applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement
AFIR Annex II (technical specifications for publicly accessible recharging points)

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent to AFIR's functional public-charging requirements. The closest standards are GB/T 34658 (interoperability requirements) and NB/T 33025 (communication protocols for EV charging), plus GB/T 27930 (DC charging communication). Chinese public chargers are increasingly connected via operator platforms (e.g., State Grid, Southern Grid, TELD), but AFIR-equivalent ad-hoc payment, data-access, smart recharging and Norway/EEA connector requirements are not mandated by Chinese regulation.
summary.zh: 中国目前没有与AFIR公共充电功能要求直接对应的法规。最接近的标准是GB/T 34658（互操作性要求）、NB/T 33025（电动汽车充电通信协议）及GB/T 27930（直流充电通信协议）。中国公共充电桩越来越多地通过运营商平台（如国家电网、南方电网、特来电）接入，但中国法规并未强制要求等同于AFIR的即时支付、数据访问、智能充电及挪威/EEA接口要求。
summary.zht: 中國目前沒有與AFIR公共充電功能要求直接對應的法規。最接近的標準是GB/T 34658（互操作性要求）、NB/T 33025（電動汽車充電通訊協議）及GB/T 27930（直流充電通訊協議）。中國公共充電樁越來越多地透過運營商平台（如國家電網、南方電網、特來電）接入，但中國法規並未強制要求等同於AFIR的即時支付、數據訪問、智能充電及挪威/EEA接口要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34658-2017 (EV conductive charging interoperability requirements)
NB/T 33025-2016 (EV DC charging communication protocol — EVSE side)
GB/T 27930-2015 (communication protocol between off-board charger and BMS)

gap.en: Significant functional gap for public charging deployments in Norway: (1) ad-hoc payment functionality may need to be added for Norway public deployments; (2) digital connectivity, smart recharging, data-access and roaming/data exchange obligations may differ from proprietary Chinese operator platforms; (3) AFIR Annex II connector specifications differ from Chinese GB/T connector practice. These AFIR requirements apply primarily to charge point operators (CPOs), but hardware and software capability must be available at installation. Norway's world-leading EV adoption rate means Statens vegvesen and DSOs actively monitor and enforce AFIR compliance.
gap.zh: 挪威公共充电部署存在显著功能差距：（1）挪威公共部署可能需要增加即时支付功能；（2）数字连接、智能充电、数据访问及漫游/数据交换义务可能不同于中国运营商专有平台；（3）AFIR附件II的接口技术规格不同于中国GB/T接口实践。上述AFIR要求主要针对充电点运营商（CPO），但安装时须具备相应硬件和软件能力。挪威作为全球领先的电动汽车市场，Statens vegvesen和配电运营商对AFIR合规要求积极监督执行。
gap.zht: 挪威公共充電部署存在顯著功能差距：（1）挪威公共部署可能需要增加即時支付功能；（2）數碼連接、智能充電、數據訪問及漫遊/數據交換義務可能不同於中國運營商專有平台；（3）AFIR附件II的接口技術規格不同於中國GB/T接口實務。上述AFIR要求主要針對充電點運營商（CPO），但安裝時須具備相應硬件和軟件能力。挪威作為全球領先的電動汽車市場，Statens vegvesen和配電運營商對AFIR合規要求積極監督執行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for publicly accessible recharging points in Norway under Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR), applicable via EEA Agreement. Norway as the world's highest per-capita EV market means active enforcement by Statens vegvesen and DSOs.
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandated — AFIR-equivalent ad-hoc payment, data-access, smart recharging and Norway/EEA connector requirements are absent from Chinese public charging regulations.

source.publisher: Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate (NVE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AFIR (applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement) introduces functional requirements for publicly accessible charging points, including ad-hoc payment, price transparency, digital connectivity, smart recharging, data obligations and Annex II connector specifications. Chinese charger hardware intended for Norway public deployment must be verified for AFIR compliance before installation. Norway's world-leading EV market means enforcement is active and rigorous.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] AFIR（通过EEA协议适用于挪威）针对公众可访问充电点引入功能要求，包括即时支付、价格透明度、数字连接、智能充电、数据义务及附件II接口技术规格。拟用于挪威公共部署的中国充电模块硬件在安装前须核查是否符合AFIR要求。挪威作为全球领先的电动汽车市场，执法积极严格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] AFIR（通過EEA協議適用於挪威）針對公眾可訪問充電點引入功能要求，包括即時支付、價格透明度、數碼連接、智能充電、數據義務及附件II接口技術規格。擬用於挪威公共部署的中國充電模組硬件在安裝前須核查是否符合AFIR要求。挪威作為全球領先的電動汽車市場，執法積極嚴格。
